message:
feat(core): add context tags to SkillMetadata for auto-loading

Add ContextTags struct to enable skills to declare relevance criteria:

- project_types: List of project types (rust, node, python, etc.)
- file_patterns: Glob patterns for relevant files (*.rs, Cargo.toml)
- tools: Tool/binary names that indicate relevance (cargo, npm)
- signals: Advanced regex patterns with weights for content matching

Features:
- Case-insensitive matching for project types and tools
- Glob pattern support including **, *.ext, and prefix*
- ContextSignal with regex compilation and weighted scoring
- Empty context tags are not serialized (clean JSON/YAML output)
- 13 new unit tests for context matching and serialization

Integration:
- Added context field to SkillMetadata (optional, defaults empty)
- Updated load.rs to preserve context from parsed metadata
- Updated test_utils/arbitrary.rs for property testing

Closes: meta_skill-na33

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -593,6 +593,7 @@ fn merge_metadata(skill: &SkillRecord, parsed_meta: &SkillMetadata) -> SkillMeta
         platforms: parsed_meta.platforms.clone(),
         author: skill.author.clone().or_else(|| parsed_meta.author.clone()),
         license: parsed_meta.license.clone(),
+        context: parsed_meta.context.clone(),
     }
 }
